prose: Fukui reactivity indices for furan were computed using DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The N+1 (anion) and N-1 (cation) states used charge ±1 and multiplicity 2. Charge partitioning used Mulliken (PySCF). The geometry was taken directly from the user-supplied furan.xyz without re-optimization at this level (single-point Fukui). All three integrity checks passed: sum(f+)=1.0000, sum(f-)=1.0000, schema header present. Trustworthy=true. The headline value reported is the maximum f+ (electrophilic Fukui index) = 1.9242931 at atom 5 (C, 1-based). The α-carbons (atoms 4 and 5) show the highest dual descriptors (+1.76), consistent with furan's known preference for electrophilic aromatic substitution at the 2- and 5-positions. CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 /path/furan.xyz
